name: FIBROUS PSEUDOTUMOR OF SCROTUM
definition: NODULAR PERIORCHITIS = NODULAR FIBROSIS uncommon benign reactive fibrous proliferation predominantly hypoechoic lymph node ← spindle cell proliferation in connective tissue

demographics.Frequency: 3rd most common paratesticular mass (after lipoma and epididymal adenomatoid
demographics.Histo: dense fibrous tissue with interspersed fibroblasts and mixed inflammatory cells

dominant_finding: hypoechoic mass(es) arising from tunica vaginalis (76%):
discriminating_features: hypoechoic mass(es) arising from tunica vaginalis (76%):
uniformly low signal intensity on T1WI + T2WI like fibroma

general: hypoechoic mass(es) arising from tunica vaginalis (76%):
uniformly low signal intensity on T1WI + T2WI like fibroma
single / multiple hypoechoic / hyperechoic nodules arising from epididymis / spermatic cord /
thickening of inner surface of tunica vaginalis ← diffuse proliferative encasement of testis
inflammatory pseudotumor of paratesticular lymph node
